name: depth-push
title: depthPush
description: Push with parallax depth scale — outgoing scene scales down as it pushes off, incoming scales from slightly larger. The catalog's signature multi-scene move; reads as a camera dolly between scenes. Onda-original.
pickWhen: stringing multiple scenes as one camera move — explainer chapters, product tour. Use `push` for flat pan; `morph` for in-place.
